app.title: QuickClipboard
app.subtitle: React Version - In Development
app.description: This is a basic React project framework

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this favorite item?

dialog.pickModeMessage: Select folder or files to add

placeholder.selectDeviceFirst: Please select an online device first

tooltip.resizeComposer: Drag to resize the input area

toast.dragTimeoutCancelled: Drag timed out (10s), this add action was cancelled

emoji.title: Emoji/Symbols
emoji.noRecent: Click a symbol to add to recent
emoji.onlyGifAllowed: This category only accepts GIF files
emoji.onlyImageAllowed: This category only accepts non-GIF images

groups.title: Groups
groups.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete group "{{name}}"? Items in this group will be moved to "All".
groups.deleteFailed: Failed to delete group, please try again

lanSync.title: LAN Sync
lanSync.description: Sync clipboard records with other devices on the same LAN
lanSync.statusDesc: Show realtime LAN Sync runtime and connection status
lanSync.statusConnectedCountDesc: Number of devices currently connected to this machine (server mode only)
lanSync.statusPeerUrlDesc: Server URL the client is currently connected to (client mode only)
lanSync.statusDeviceNameDesc: Name this desktop device shows to other devices in LAN Sync
lanSync.statusDeviceIdDesc: Identifier of this device used to distinguish devices in LAN Sync
lanSync.localUrlsDesc: Other devices on the same LAN can connect to this machine using the URLs below
lanSync.enabledDesc: When enabled, you can run as server or connect as client
lanSync.sendEnabledDesc: Whether to automatically send the latest local clipboard record to other devices on the LAN
lanSync.receiveEnabledDesc: Whether to accept clipboard records sent from other devices on the LAN
lanSync.receiveWriteClipboardDesc: When enabled, received sync data will be written to the system clipboard for quick paste
lanSync.modeDesc: Run as server or connect to a server
lanSync.serverPortDesc: Port to listen on when running as server
lanSync.peerUrlDesc: WebSocket URL to connect to when running as client
lanSync.connectionConfigDesc: Configure the server URL and pair code
lanSync.pairCodeDesc: Enter the 10-digit pair code to connect to the server
lanSync.connectionControlDesc: Manually connect or disconnect (paired devices can reconnect without a pair code)
lanSync.pairCodeTitleDesc: Clients need a pair code to connect to this server
lanSync.trustedDevicesDesc: Devices that have been paired and saved
lanSync.trustedDeviceRemoveConfirm: Remove this device? It will need to enter the pair code again to connect.
lanSync.pairCodeInputDesc: Enter the pair code provided by the server
lanSync.pairCodeDisplayDesc: Display the pair code for clients to connect
lanSync.pairCodeTimeRemainingDesc: Time remaining before the pair code expires
lanSync.pairCodeRefreshButtonDesc: Refresh the pair code to generate a new one
lanSync.autoStartDesc: Automatically start LAN Sync on app launch (server listens, client connects)

general.title: General Settings
general.autoStartDesc: Launch QuickClipboard automatically when system starts
general.runAsAdminDesc: Always launch the application with administrator privileges (requires restart)
general.runAsAdminRestartConfirm: A restart is required to run as administrator. Restart now?
general.startupNotificationDesc: Show system notification when app starts
general.autoLowMemoryDesc: Automatically enter low memory mode when none of the QuickClipboard windows have been interacted with for a while
general.autoLowMemoryIdleMinutesDesc: Automatically enter low memory mode when no window interaction occurs for the selected duration
general.autoExitLowMemoryModeDesc: Automatically exit low memory mode when showing the clipboard or taking a screenshot in low memory mode
general.historyLimitDesc: Maximum number of clipboard history items to save

appearance.title: Personalization
appearance.description: Customize the appearance and theme of the application
appearance.darkThemeStyleDesc: Choose the display style for dark theme
appearance.darkThemeModernDesc: Vibrant modern dark theme with rich colors
appearance.backgroundBlurStrengthDesc: Adjust the frosted-glass blur used by the Super Background theme, and set it to 0% to disable blur
appearance.backgroundImageDesc: Select a custom background image for super background theme
appearance.clipboardAnimationDesc: Enable or disable animation effects for clipboard window show and hide
appearance.uiAnimationDesc: Enable or disable UI animations (tab slider, hover float, list insert, panel show, etc.)
appearance.cardSpacingDesc: Spacing between items in card style (px)

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.quickpasteWindowDesc: Quickly preview and paste clipboard content
shortcuts.screenshotDesc: Take a screenshot with toolbar for editing
shortcuts.screenshotQuickSaveDesc: Copy to clipboard immediately after selection
shortcuts.screenshotQuickPinDesc: Create pin image immediately after selection
shortcuts.screenshotQuickOcrDesc: OCR recognize and copy text immediately after selection
shortcuts.screenshotCancelDesc: Cancel current tool or exit screenshot
shortcuts.screenshotConfirmDesc: Confirm and copy screenshot to clipboard
shortcuts.screenshotRadialPickerDesc: Hold to show radial tool picker, release to select
shortcuts.toggleClipboardMonitorDesc: Quickly enable or disable clipboard monitoring
shortcuts.togglePasteWithFormatDesc: Quickly toggle whether to preserve formatting when pasting
shortcuts.toggleLowMemoryModeDesc: Quickly enter or exit low memory mode. No shortcut is set by default.
shortcuts.pastePlainTextDesc: Paste first item when window hidden, paste selected item when window visible (both as plain text)
shortcuts.numberShortcutsDesc: Quickly operate clipboard items with number keys
shortcuts.enableNumberShortcutsDesc: Use shortcut + number to quickly operate clipboard items
shortcuts.numberShortcutsModifierDesc: Choose modifier key combination for number shortcuts
shortcuts.enableMouseShortcutDesc: Use middle mouse button to quickly paste clipboard content
shortcuts.mouseShortcutModifierDesc: Choose modifier key combination for middle mouse button
shortcuts.numberDesc: Quickly operate clipboard items with number keys
shortcuts.enableNumberDesc: Use shortcut + number to quickly operate clipboard items
shortcuts.numberModifierDesc: Choose modifier key combination for number shortcuts
shortcuts.numberRegistrationFailed: The following shortcuts failed to register (may be occupied by other programs)
shortcuts.enableMouseMiddleDesc: Use middle mouse button to quickly paste clipboard content
shortcuts.mouseMiddleModifierDesc: Choose modifier key combination for middle mouse button
shortcuts.mouseMiddleTriggerDesc: Choose trigger mode for middle button alone
shortcuts.mouseMiddleLongPressThresholdDesc: Hold time to trigger long press (milliseconds)
shortcuts.tabLeftDesc: Switch to the tab on the left
shortcuts.tabRightDesc: Switch to the tab on the right
shortcuts.pinDragDesc: Drag to move the pinned image window
shortcuts.pinCloseDesc: Double-click to close the pinned image
shortcuts.pinMenuDesc: Show context menu for the pinned image
shortcuts.pinThumbnailDesc: Switch between normal and thumbnail mode
shortcuts.pinZoomDesc: Zoom the pinned image window (10% per step)
shortcuts.pinZoomFastDesc: Fast zoom the pinned image (20% per step)
shortcuts.pinZoomFineDesc: Fine zoom the pinned image (1% per step)
shortcuts.pinInnerZoomDesc: Zoom the image content inside window (10% per step)
shortcuts.pinInnerZoomFastDesc: Fast zoom the image content (50% per step)
shortcuts.pinInnerDragDesc: Drag to move the zoomed image content

clipboard.title: Clipboard
clipboard.description: Configure clipboard monitoring and handling options
clipboard.saveImagesDesc: Automatically save copied images into clipboard history
clipboard.imagePreviewDesc: Show a floating preview when hovering image items
clipboard.textPreviewDesc: Show more content when hovering text items
clipboard.filePreviewDesc: Show the full file list when hovering file items
clipboard.displayPriorityDesc: Control list display priority for multi-format content
clipboard.imageMaxSizeDesc: Images larger than this will not show preview in the list
clipboard.imageMaxDimensionDesc: Images exceeding this dimension will not show preview in the list
clipboard.autoScrollToTopDesc: Automatically scroll to first item when new content arrives or window is shown
clipboard.autoClearSearchDesc: Automatically clear search box when window is shown
clipboard.rememberWindowSizeDesc: Remember and restore previous window size
clipboard.edgeHideEnabledDesc: Automatically hide window when snapped to screen edge
clipboard.edgeHideOffsetDesc: Number of pixels protruding when the window is hidden at edge
clipboard.autoFocusSearchDesc: Automatically focus search box when window is shown
clipboard.pasteToTopDesc: After pasting, move the item to the top of the clipboard list
clipboard.showBadgesDesc: Show badges in top-left corner for pasted, pinned, or missing file status
clipboard.showSourceIconDesc: Display the source application icon at the index position
clipboard.pasteShortcutModeDesc: Shift+Insert is more stable, Ctrl+V has wider compatibility
clipboard.contentFilterDesc: Filter specific types or formats of clipboard content
clipboard.ignoreEmptyDesc: Don't save empty or whitespace-only content
clipboard.ignoreFormatDesc: Set specific clipboard formats to ignore (one per line)
clipboard.ignoreFormatPlaceholder:
Example:
HTML Format
Chrome-DevTools-Image
One format per line

aiConfig.title: AI Configuration
aiConfig.description: Configure AI translation and smart features
aiConfig.apiKeyDesc: Enter your AI service API key
aiConfig.testDesc: Test if current AI configuration works

translation.title: AI Translation
translation.description: Configure AI translation features and options
translation.enabledDesc: Enable or disable AI translation feature
translation.autoCloseDesc: Automatically close translation window after pasting
translation.newlineModeDesc: How to handle newlines in translated text
translation.temperatureDesc: Control randomness and creativity of translation (0.0-2.0)
translation.promptPlaceholder: Example: You are a professional translation assistant...
translation.testDesc: Test if current translation configuration works

quickpaste.title: Quick Paste
quickpaste.enabledDesc: Use shortcut to quickly preview and paste clipboard content
quickpaste.pasteOnModifierReleaseDesc: When enabled, paste on modifier key release (e.g. Ctrl); when disabled, paste on secondary key release (e.g. `)
quickpaste.itemsCountDesc: Number of items to show in quick paste window

screenshot.title: Screenshot
screenshot.colorIncludeFormatDesc: Show RGB, HEX and other formats when picking color
screenshot.lifecycleModeDesc: Controls how the screenshot window is handled after capture, balancing startup speed and resource usage.
screenshot.lifecycleModeQuickDesc: Hides the window after capture and performs basic cleanup for the fastest next launch (may use minimal background resources).
screenshot.lifecycleModeDisposeDesc: Releases the window immediately after capture to minimize background CPU and memory usage (next launch may be slower).
screenshot.lifecycleModeAutoDesc: Keeps the window temporarily after capture and automatically releases it if no screenshot is taken within the specified time.
screenshot.autoDisposeMinutesDesc: In Smart Mode, the window will be automatically released if no screenshot is taken within this time after capture.

sound.title: Sound
sound.description: Configure sound effects for copy and paste operations
sound.enableDesc: Enable or disable operation sound effects
sound.copySoundDesc: Sound file to play on copy operation
sound.copySoundTimingDesc: Choose when to play copy sound
sound.pasteSoundDesc: Sound file to play on paste operation
sound.pasteSoundTimingDesc: Choose when to play paste sound

appFilter.title: Application Filter
appFilter.description: Decide whether to process clipboard based on app rules
appFilter.enabledDesc: When enabled, the rules below will take effect
appFilter.modeDesc: Choose which apps the rules apply to
appFilter.blacklistDesc: Apps in the list are affected
appFilter.whitelistDesc: Apps outside the list are affected
appFilter.effectDesc: What features are affected when rules apply
appFilter.effectClipboardOnlyDesc: When rules apply: do not record/process clipboard content; hotkeys/middle click/edge hide still work
appFilter.effectGlobalDisableDesc: When rules apply and the app is foreground: suspend hotkeys/mouse hooks/edge hide/clipboard monitoring to avoid disrupting fullscreen apps
appFilter.manageDesc: Add or remove applications to filter
appFilter.clickRefresh: Click refresh to get running applications
appFilter.tip1: Whitelist: rules apply to apps outside the list
appFilter.tip2: Blacklist: rules apply to apps in the list
appFilter.tip3: Process names are case-sensitive, e.g.: chrome.exe

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: Manage clipboard data and app settings
dataManagement.exportDesc: Package your data as a ZIP file for backup
dataManagement.exportAllDataDesc: Export clipboard history, favorites, groups, settings, and image data
dataManagement.importDesc: Restore your data from ZIP file
dataManagement.importDataDesc: Select a previously exported ZIP file to restore data
dataManagement.importModeDesc: Choose how to handle the import
dataManagement.modeMergeDesc: Only merge data content, keep current settings
dataManagement.changePathDesc: Select a new directory to store app data, system will automatically migrate existing data
dataManagement.resetPathDesc: Reset data storage location to system default AppData directory
dataManagement.cleanupDesc: Clean up and reset application data
dataManagement.clearConfirm: Clear all clipboard history? This cannot be undone!
dataManagement.resetSettingsDesc: Reset all settings to default values, keep data content
dataManagement.resetConfirm: Reset all settings? This cannot be undone!
dataManagement.resetAllDesc: Delete all data and restore default settings
dataManagement.resetAllConfirm: Reset all data? This will delete all content and restore default settings. This cannot be undone!
dataManagement.migrationConflictDesc: QuickClipboard data already exists at the target location. Please choose how to proceed:
dataManagement.migrationSourceOnlyDesc: Migrate current data to target location, existing data at target will be overwritten
dataManagement.migrationTargetOnlyDesc: Use existing data at target location, current data will be discarded
dataManagement.migrationMergeDesc: Merge current data with target data, keeping content from both
dataManagement.selectBackupDesc: Choose a backup file to restore

about.title: About
about.descriptionText: A powerful clipboard management tool to help you manage and use clipboard content more efficiently.
about.updateSettingsDesc: These options affect background update checks. Manual checks are not limited by the interval.
about.updateIntervalDesc: Choose how often the app automatically checks for updates in the background.
about.includeBetaUpdatesDesc: When enabled, the beta channel is preferred. When disabled, only stable releases are used. If you have never changed this option, stable versions default to off and beta versions default to on; after saving, your choice always wins.
about.disableUpdatePopupDesc: When enabled, background checks will no longer open the updater window. Instead, the icon on the left side of the main window title bar will turn into a green update marker, and clicking it will open the updater window. Manual update checks still open the updater window.

footer.adjustLayout: Drag to adjust the left and right split

multiSelect.fileMixedUnsupported: Files cannot be merged with other content types
multiSelect.unsupportedType: The selection contains unsupported content types

contextMenu.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all clipboard history? This cannot be undone.

showShortcuts.label: Show List Shortcuts
showShortcuts.description: Show number shortcut hints on the right side of list items

showIndex.label: Show List Index
showIndex.description: Show item index numbers on the right side of list items

updater.title: Update
updater.updateWindowOpened: New version found, updater window opened
updater.downloadFailed: Failed to download or install the update. Please try again later or download the latest installer from GitHub.
updater.portableNoAutoUpdate: Portable/standalone version does not support auto-update. Please download the new version manually and replace the current file.
